{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/58036457?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/io-no/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/io-no/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/io-no/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/io-no/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/io-no", "id": 58036457, "login": "io-no", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjU4MDM2NDU3", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/io-no/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/io-no/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/io-no/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/io-no/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/io-no/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/io-no", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2025-1550", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:A/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:H/SI:H/SA:H"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}], "description": "### Impact

The Keras `Model.load_model` function permits arbitrary code execution, even with `safe_mode=True`, through a manually constructed, malicious `.keras` archive. By altering the `config.json` file within the archive, an attacker can specify arbitrary Python modules and functions, along with their arguments, to be loaded and executed during model loading.

### Patches

This problem is fixed starting with version `3.9`.

### Workarounds

Only load models from trusted sources and model archives created with Keras.

### References

- https://www.cve.org/cverecord?id=CVE-2025-1550

title: Arbitrary Code Execution via Crafted Keras Config for Model Loading
